creator: wg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to William Grzybowski from comment #0)
> There are ports that might require xpyb compiled in (e.g. x11-wm/qtile).
> 
> I ask to enable it by default or create a subport if thats not an option.
> 
> Thank you.

Note that subport would probably create too many problems with conflicts unless we change all the install paths.
